content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems can be restructured around an episodic planning-centric neural architecture that gates active querying of new data by how much a new unlabeled experience would fill critical gaps in the agent’s current episodic planning trajectories, rather than just querying for uncertainty alone. This creates a curiosity-driven active learning loop where new memory acquisition is prioritized to improve long-horizon planning capability instead of just reducing static prediction error.
source_topics: neural architecture memory episodic planning agent
